mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT ur.name FROM ums_admin ua LEFT JOIN ums_admin_role_relation uarr ON ua.id = uarr.admin_id LEFT JOIN ums_role ur2 ON uarr.role_id = ur2.id LEFT JOIN ums_role_resource_relation urrr ON ur2.id = urrr.role_id LEFT JOIN ums_resource ur ON urrr.resource_id = ur.id WHERE ua.username = #{username} AND ur.name IS NOT NULL
